event_name: I-Sass on the Beach Hawaiian Night" Music Festival at Pran's Corner Pak Nam Pran"
event_description: I-Sass On The Beach 'Hawaiian Night' 2025March 22 6.00p - 12.00a @ Pran's Corner\, Pak Nam Pran Food and Drinks The 2025 I-Sass On The Beach event comes with the theme 'Hawaiian Night'. We would like to invite our friends to have fun because this time we are going all out. We are serving BBQ with pork\, chicken\, shrimp\, squid\, grilled sausages (chicken\, pork\, bacon)\, and buttered corn\, totaling 700 skewers with vegetable salad. Or if you prefer to order by the plate\, the restaurant also offers American fried rice topped with a fried egg or chicken macaroni stir-fry. There is clear soup and fruit dessert. For drinks\, soft drinks are served. For those who bring their own wine\, there is no corkage fee. Music\, songs and games to win prizes For music and songs\, we will have a full performance as usual with 3 bands and 1 solo artist from 6 pm to midnight (6 full hours). We will have fun listening and dancing. It will start with Aun Sax who will come with cool\, easy listening songs\, both singing and playing the saxophone. During this time\, food will be ready to serve\, with both buffet and BBQ. After that\, a little after 7:00 PM\, 'The Beach' band (the house band of the Mum Pran restaurant) will come to sing fun songs from the 70s and 80s for you to listen to. Then\, it will be 'The Vinyl' band with songs from the 60s and 70s from 8:30 PM onwards. And before 10:00 PM\, it will be the turn of the host I-Sass Play On. But this time\, Brother Taem Charas Fuangarom will join the band and sing an immortal love song that everyone must know\, 'Tang Ru Gor Rak'. Pran Buri people must not miss this event. After that\, it will be back to The Beach band again and they will play until midnight. And this time\, it will be more special than the previous times because we will have games to win prizes every time the band changes. It is an easy game to play\, focusing on fun and excitement\, and will make you feel like a child again. The prizes provided can be used at the event. Such as wine\, etc. Booking and ticket fee This event will charge a ticket fee of 1\,200 baht\, including food and drinks\, corkage fee\, the right to join the game to win prizes\, and enjoy music through 4 live shows and a fairly open atmosphere\, not crowded because there are only 100 seats+. Contact channel for booking tickets\, contact Khun Vee welove\, call 0802682220 and you can follow the news and receive tickets via Line@ of we love by adding LINE ID: @welove Event location This event will still be held at 'Mum Pran' (click to see the map) Tambon Pak Nam Pran\, Amphoe Pran Buri\, Prachuap Khiri Khan Province because the atmosphere of the shop looks spacious\, shady\, near the sea\, private\, not stuffy. If it was not really good\, it would not be held here for the 3rd time. Therefore\, anyone who has never been to this shop should take this opportunity to have fun. As for anyone who has been here before\, no need to explain much because every time I come\, it is fun every time. In order not to miss a good seat\, it is recommended to book early. Book early\, you have the right to choose the seat first. Accommodation hotels Accommodation hotels We have coordinated with 2 famous hotels in Pranburi: Golden Pine Hotel (Tel. 081-943-7071) and Pattawia Hotel (Tel. 065-338-1315)\, which are located less than a kilometer from Mum Pran Restaurant (the venue). Customers can contact the hotel directly to book. Just tell the hotel the code and you will immediately get the right to book a room at a special price. We will only inform the code to those who have booked tickets. Don't forget that those who book first and pay first will have the right to choose their seats first. We will arrange the layout according to your needs. See you there! I-Sass / weloveFebruary 10\, 2025 Pran's Corner is located on the beach road in Pak Nam Pran Open from 2p to 11p Sunday thru Monday. Closed Tuesdays
evcal_subtitle: I-Sass Hawaiian NightFestival @ Pran's Corner

event_name: afternoon drop-in Meditation
event_description: Sunday afternoon meditation practice session\, from 2pm - 3pm\, plus refreshments and social time at the end. Join us for a group meditation practice session on Sunday afternoon. It is fine to arrive late or leave early\, as your schedule permits. If it's your first time (and you'd like to receive meditation instructions)\, please arrive a few minutes early\, to make sure you don't miss the start of the session and the chance to receive instructions. Open to meditation practitioners of any tradition. This is a wonderful opportunity to meditate in a supportive group setting\, and to meet and mingle with fellow practitioners (bring your friends)! We welcome both newcomers and familiar faces. Refreshments will be served at the end and there will be an opportunity to socialize. This is a drop-in session. No previous attendance\, registration\, or fee is required to attend. Suggested Donation 100 Baht (or more). The Bangkok Shambhala Center (which is a Thai non-profit Association) remains open because of the ongoing generosity of our members and program participants. Contributions can be made in cash at the class\, or by bank transfer to our account; Shambhala Mandala AssociationBangkok Bank\, Silom BranchAccount #: 118-327-3182Swift (Routing) Code: BKK BTH BK

event_name: Lee Shamrock & Neil McCartney Irish Night at Father Ted's Irish Pub & Steakhouse
event_description: Brace yourself for an extraordinary musical experience as Hua Hin's vibrant live music scene welcomes a dynamic collaboration between two legends of the genre. Every Tuesday night\, patrons of Father Ted's are in for a treat as the iconic Mr. Lee Shamrock joins forces with none other than Neil McCartney\, the fiddler extraordinaire from The Big Geranums. This exciting partnership promises to elevate Tuesday nights to new heights\, delivering a captivating blend of Live Trad & Folk that will leave audiences spellbound. As the man behind The Big Geranums\, Neil McCartney brings his exceptional talent and infectious energy to the stage\, accompanied by his trusty fiddle. Together with the enigmatic Mr. Lee Shamrock\, known for his legendary performances\, they promise to deliver an unforgettable evening of music and entertainment. Patrons can expect the unexpected as these two musical powerhouses come together to showcase their talents\, drawing from a repertoire that spans generations and genres. From traditional Irish tunes to contemporary folk melodies\, each performance is imbued with passion\, skill\, and a dash of Thairish hospitality. As guests immerse themselves in the enchanting melodies of Lee Shamrock and Neil McCartney\, Father Ted's offers a warm and welcoming atmosphere\, complete with the finest Thairish hospitality. Whether indulging in the music\, sampling the diverse menu\, or cheering on their favorite sports team\, patrons are invited to soak up the vibrant ambiance and camaraderie that define Hua Hin's premier live music venue. With live music available seven nights a week and live sports airing daily\, Father Ted's continues to be the go-to destination for entertainment in Hua Hin. Whether you're a music aficionado or simply looking for a memorable night out\, make sure to drop by and experience the magic for yourself. Cheers Folks!

event_name: Elephant & Us - a Kui Buri experience
event_description: Join us on an unforgettable cultural experience in the Hat Kham subdistrict of Kui Buri; on the edge of Kui Buri National Park. Each of the experiences is thoughtfully designed to immerse you in the world of wildlife co-existence. Elephant ConservationExperience the noble work of the Bring The Elephant Home Foundation\, dedicated to enhancing elephant survival. Engage in initiatives which help foster harmony between humans and elephants\, creating a world where both can thrive together. Witness first-hand how conservation efforts are transforming local communities\, promoting sustainable co-existence and restoring natural habitats. Tom Yum FarmingParticipate in the Tom Yum Project\, an innovative initiative that intertwines agricultural practices with elephant conservation efforts. Inspired by Tom Yum\, the famous Thai hot 'n' sour soup\, the project focuses on cultivating crops like chilli\, garlic\, lemongrass\, galangal\, kaffir lime\, onion and coriander\, which are key ingredients of Tom Yum and\, importantly\, unattractive to elephants. This strategic choice of crops serves as a natural deterrent\, protecting farmlands\, while generating income for the local farmers. To enhance the diversity and sustainability of this approach\, the project incorporates additional elephant-repellent crops such as lime\, ginger\, chamomile\, mint\, basil\, turmeric and citronella. By encouraging farmers to shift from mono-cropping practices that negatively impact biodiversity and attract elephants\, the Tom Yum Project not only promotes human-elephant co-existence but also fosters a variety of livelihoods\, boosts rural employment and plays a crucial role in preserving the vital ecosystems of Thailand. Beehive FencesIn Thailand\, beehive fences have emerged as an ingenious and peaceful solution to the growing conflicts between local farmers and the majestic elephants that once roamed freely in what are now agricultural lands. This innovative approach\, arising from the need to balance the increasing demands for resources by both humans and elephants\, utilises the natural deterrent effect of bees to prevent elephants from encroaching on farmlands. The strategic placement of beehive fences around crop fields not only effectively reduces damage caused by Asian elephants but also offers an added benefit of supplemental income for farmers through the production of honey and wax; this offers guests a chance to craft their own lip balm. This eco-friendly beehive fence method has shown great promise in mitigating violent encounters between people and these grand creatures\, paving the way for a harmonious coexistence and a sustainable future for both communities. Cook Your LunchImmerse yourself in Thai culture by preparing your own traditional lunch. Forage for fresh ingredients in the garden and learn how to cook a delicious Thai meal. This hands-on experience culminates in a communal dining experience\, enjoying your creations in true Thai style. Tie-Dye WorkshopOffering a unique opportunity for creative expression through the vibrant transformation of fabric\, Tie-dye is a craft with a rich tradition. This process involves various resist dyeing techniques where fabric is folded\, twisted\, pleated\, or crumpled and then securely bound using string or rubber bands. In this tie dye workshop\, you will be using the region's unique dark orange earth as the colour base; this imparts a vivid orange in the patterns on the fabric\, creating a one-of-a-kind design. Under the guidance of local experts\, you will have the chance to craft your own custom-made scarf. This hands-on experience not only ignites your creativity but also leaves you with a sustainable and personal memento of your Thai adventure\, blending traditional techniques with your individual artistic flair. Go Wild On SafariEmbark on an exciting safari through the Kui Buri National Park in an open-air vehicle. Explore diverse ecosystems and possibly encounter a variety of wildlife in their natural habitat; from majestic elephants to gaurs\, deer\, wild boars and an array of birds and reptiles\, each safari offers a unique and thrilling experience\, with different sightings each day. Join us on this full-day experience and prepare for an unforgettable cultural immersion\, as you spend time at the Bring The Elephant Home Foundation. From hands-on experiences to cooking your own lunch\, 'Elephants & Us: A Kui Buri Encounter' promises a memorable experience in the Thai wilderness. WHO SHOULD DO THIS TOUR?This tour is for the person who wants to not only see wildlife\, but also understand how local villagers are working towards supporting themselves and co-existing with elephants; prepare to get involved! Where: Kui BuriOperates: Daily 9:30am to 6:30pmDuration: Approx 9 hoursGroup Size: Min 4 People / Max 8 PeopleWalking Distance: None\, as we use an a/c minivanTransport: Tour departs from the Hua Hin ClocktowerFood Included: Tom Yum tea\, Thai lunch and water.Note:This tour is suitable for Vegans & Vegetarians however please let us know upon booking.It's not suitable for celiacs or those with other food restrictions/allergies. Adult Price 12+ years: 3150 THBChild Price 6 to 11 years: 2650 THB

event_name: Elephant & us
event_description: Join us on an unforgettable cultural experience in the Hat Kham subdistrict of Kui Buri; on the edge of Kui Buri National Park. Each of the experiences is thoughtfully designed to immerse you in the world of wildlife co-existence. Elephant Conservation Experience the noble work of the Bring The Elephant Home Foundation\, dedicated to enhancing elephant survival. Engage in initiatives which help foster harmony between humans and elephants\, creating a world where both can thrive together. Witness first-hand how conservation efforts are transforming local communities\, promoting sustainable co-existence and restoring natural habitats. Tom Yum Farming Participate in the Tom Yum Project\, an innovative initiative that intertwines agricultural practices with elephant conservation efforts. Inspired by Tom Yum\, the famous Thai hot 'n' sour soup\, the project focuses on cultivating crops like chilli\, garlic\, lemongrass\, galangal\, kaffir lime\, onion and coriander\, which are key ingredients of Tom Yum and\, importantly\, unattractive to elephants. This strategic choice of crops serves as a natural deterrent\, protecting farmlands\, while generating income for the local farmers. To enhance the diversity and sustainability of this approach\, the project incorporates additional elephant-repellent crops such as lime\, ginger\, chamomile\, mint\, basil\, turmeric and citronella. By encouraging farmers to shift from mono-cropping practices that negatively impact biodiversity and attract elephants\, the Tom Yum Project not only promotes human-elephant co-existence but also fosters a variety of livelihoods\, boosts rural employment and plays a crucial role in preserving the vital ecosystems of Thailand. Beehive Fences In Thailand\, beehive fences have emerged as an ingenious and peaceful solution to the growing conflicts between local farmers and the majestic elephants that once roamed freely in what are now agricultural lands. This innovative approach\, arising from the need to balance the increasing demands for resources by both humans and elephants\, utilises the natural deterrent effect of bees to prevent elephants from encroaching on farmlands. The strategic placement of beehive fences around crop fields not only effectively reduces damage caused by Asian elephants but also offers an added benefit of supplemental income for farmers through the production of honey and wax; this offers guests a chance to craft their own lip balm. This eco-friendly beehive fence method has shown great promise in mitigating violent encounters between people and these grand creatures\, paving the way for a harmonious coexistence and a sustainable future for both communities. Cook Your Lunch Immerse yourself in Thai culture by preparing your own traditional lunch. Forage for fresh ingredients in the garden and learn how to cook a delicious Thai meal. This hands-on experience culminates in a communal dining experience\, enjoying your creations in true Thai style. Tie-Dye Workshop Offering a unique opportunity for creative expression through the vibrant transformation of fabric\, Tie-dye is a craft with a rich tradition. This process involves various resist dyeing techniques where fabric is folded\, twisted\, pleated\, or crumpled and then securely bound using string or rubber bands. In this tie dye workshop\, you will be using the region's unique dark orange earth as the colour base; this imparts a vivid orange in the patterns on the fabric\, creating a one-of-a-kind design. Under the guidance of local experts\, you will have the chance to craft your own custom-made scarf. This hands-on experience not only ignites your creativity but also leaves you with a sustainable and personal memento of your Thai adventure\, blending traditional techniques with your individual artistic flair. Go Wild On Safari Embark on an exciting safari through the Kui Buri National Park in an open-air vehicle. Explore diverse ecosystems and possibly encounter a variety of wildlife in their natural habitat; from majestic elephants to gaurs\, deer\, wild boars and an array of birds and reptiles\, each safari offers a unique and thrilling experience\, with different sightings each day. Join us on this full-day experience and prepare for an unforgettable cultural immersion\, as you spend time at the Bring The Elephant Home Foundation. From hands-on experiences to cooking your own lunch\, 'Elephants & Us: A Kui Buri Encounter' promises a memorable experience in the Thai wilderness. WHO SHOULD DO THIS TOUR? This tour is for the person who wants to not only see wildlife\, but also understand how local villagers are working towards supporting themselves and co-existing with elephants; prepare to get involved! Where: Kui Buri Operates: Daily 9:30am to 6:30pm Duration: Approx 9 hours Group Size: Min 4 People / Max 8 People Walking Distance: None\, as we use an a/c minivan Transport: Tour departs from the Hua Hin Clocktower Food Included: Tom Yum tea\, Thai lunch and water. Note:This tour is suitable for Vegans & Vegetarians however please let us know upon booking. It's not suitable for celiacs or those with other food restrictions/allergies. Adult Price 12+ years: 3150 THB Child Price 6 to 11 years: 2650 THB
evcal_subtitle: Join us on an unforgettable cultural experience in the Hat Kham subdistrict of Kui Buri; on the edge of Kui Buri National Park.

event_name: Sunday Night Blues with Don & Tor
event_description: Music enthusiasts are in for a treat every Sunday night as Father Ted's\, Hua Hin's premier live music venue on Soi 61\, presents the dynamic duo Don and Tor\, delivering an enchanting blend of Blues\, Folk\, and easy listening melodies. Beginning each Sunday evening\, patrons can indulge in the soulful sounds of Don and Tor as they take the stage\, providing a captivating soundtrack to complement the lively atmosphere of Father Ted's. Against the backdrop of live sports\, guests are invited to immerse themselves in an evening of musical bliss\, where the best of Blues and Folk intertwine with the excitement of sports action. Renowned for their exceptional talent and infectious energy\, Don and Tor create a welcoming ambiance\, drawing listeners in with their smooth vocals and skillful instrumentation. Whether performing beloved classics or original compositions\, the duo's performances resonate with audiences of all ages\, making them a favorite among locals and visitors alike. As guests unwind and enjoy the musical stylings of Don and Tor\, Father Ted's offers a welcoming environment complete with excellent service and a diverse selection of beverages. Whether seated indoors or outdoors\, patrons can savor the music while soaking in the vibrant atmosphere of Hua Hin's premier live music venue. With their dedication to delivering exceptional live entertainment\, Father Ted's continues to solidify its reputation as a must-visit destination for music lovers in Hua Hin. Whether seeking a relaxing evening of Blues and Folk melodies or an exciting sports viewing experience\, guests can count on Father Ted's to provide an unforgettable Sunday night filled with music\, camaraderie\, and entertainment.

event_name: Surfin' Cadillacs - Electric Pin Up Splash
event_description: **You're Invited to Surfin' Cadillas - Electric Pin-Up Splash! **Get ready for a time-traveling extravaganza as we bring the golden eras of the 50s\, 60s\, and 70s to life at the sensational 'Surfin' Cadillas - Electric Pin-Up Splash' on March 23\, 2024\, hosted at the iconic Pin Up Cafe Hua Hin!**What to Expect:** **Music Extravaganza:**  Immerse yourself in the nostalgic beats of surf rock\, electro swing\, and funk\, with DJs Locohood from Mexico\, DJane Rujaya from Hua Hin\, and DJ Cashews from Germany! Locohood has enchanted crowds across Europe\, from Berlin and Cologne to Lisbon and Barcelona. DJane Rujaya\, a well-known name in Hua Hin\, will spin tunes that keep the dance floor alive. DJ Cashews\, a regular at elite venues like Peer 23 in Mannheim\, Villa Nachttanz\, and Halle 02 in Heidelberg\, has also graced stages at festivals such as 'Psylan' in the Netherlands. Brace yourself for a night of musical ecstasy! **Visual Delights:**  Let your senses run wild with captivating visuals and animations by the maestro\, Erick LocoHood\, and his team from SharedMindVisuals (SMV). A mesmerizing light show with 3D projection mapping will elevate your retro experience to new heights\, creating an atmosphere that's nothing short of magical! SMV has left their mark on clubs\, festivals\, and locations across Europe\, Malaysia\, and Mexico\, including Fusion Festival and Psy-Fi in Holland\, and Circle of Leaves Festival. **Culinary Magic:**  Embark on a culinary adventure with our signature BBQ skewers fresh from the grill\, sizzling and tempting your taste buds. Additionally\, indulge in a variety of mouthwatering Thai dishes that will elevate your dining experience to new heights.To ensure you have a seat in the restaurant and enjoy the full range of our delectable menu\, please make a reservation under [Pin Up Cafe Hua Hin's Facebook Page](https://web.facebook.com/pinupcafehuahin) or contact us via Call/Line at 0938734888. In the restaurant\, you will receive regular service and have access to our complete menu\, promising a dining experience as delightful as the event itself.**Note:** The restaurant reservations are separate from the event entrance fee. Secure your spot for the event through the provided ticket link or at the ticket desk on the day of the event.  **Cannabis Smoker Lounge:**  Discover tranquility at our Cannabis Smoker Lounge located on the western end of the venue\, ensuring everyone's comfort. Explore a curated selection of joints and edibles in a relaxed\, friendly environment. **Limited Edition Merchandise:**  Dress up in your best 50s\, 60s\, or 70s rockabilly\, hippie attire\, and receive free goodies at the door! Don't miss the chance to grab exclusive event merchandise\, including limited edition t-shirts and posters\, ensuring you can take home a piece of the night.**Event Details:**- **Date:** March 23\, 2024- **Time:** 6:00 PM - 12:00 AM- **Location:** Pin Up Cafe Hua Hin\, 43/23 Prarachdamrhi\, Nong Kae\, Hua Hin District\, Prachuap Khiri Khan 77110- **Entrance Fee:**  Secure your spot in advance for just 350THB via the following link: Eventbrite - Surfin' Cadillacs https://www.eventbrite.com/.../surfin-cadillacs-tickets... or pay at the ticket desk on the day for the regular price of 500THB!  **Payment Options:**- **Credit Card & PayPal:** Eventbrite -https://www.eventbrite.com/.../surfin-cadillacs-tickets... - **Thai Bank Account or True Money:** Connect with us on LINE https://line.me/R/ti/p/@459kovnm?from=page... for further instructions.Get ready for a night of high-energy beats\, stunning visuals\, and a retro vibe like no other. Spread the word\, bring your friends\, and let's make memories at Surfin' Cadillas - Electric Pin-Up Splash!  Will there be a shuttle or transport to and from the event? Yes\, we will organize taxi drivers and minivans to be on the location. To get to the event we will have some taxis going from the Shiva Shop in Hua Hin. If you have any question write to us on LINE (QR is on any poster and all social Media and also on this page).
event_location: 43/23 Prarachdamrhi, Nong Kae, Hua Hin District, Prachuap Khiri Khan 77110, Thailand

event_name: Bicycle Flea Market
event_description: We are delighted to invite you to our highly anticipated Bicycle Flea Market\, happening every first Saturday of the month. It's an incredible opportunity to explore a wide array of new and used bikes\, parts\, accessories\, bicycle jerseys\, and so much more!During our Bicycle Flea Market\, you'll have the chance to browse through a diverse selection of cycling merchandise. Whether you're seeking an upgrade for your current bike\, searching for unique accessories\, or looking to add to your collection of bicycle jerseys\, we've got you covered! In addition to our own offerings\, we encourage all attendees to bring their bikes and bike-related items to sell\, swap\, donate\, or whatever suits their fancy. This is a fantastic opportunity to connect with fellow cycling enthusiasts\, exchange knowledge and stories\, and find great deals on all things bike-related. We will have shaded tables available for sellers to display their items.We believe in fostering a vibrant cycling community and providing a platform for bike lovers to come together. So\, whether you're a seasoned cyclist\, a casual rider\, or simply curious about the world of bicycles\, this event is for you! Don't miss out on the chance to immerse yourself in a bustling atmosphere filled with bikes\, gear\, and passionate individuals. We encourage you to invite your friends\, family\, and fellow cycling enthusiasts to join this event. Yours in Cycling Adventures\,Christopher & Siranee ByrdHua Hin Bike Toursby Adventure Cycling Thailand Hua Hin Bike Tours Office - Located 80 meters inside Takiap Village Soi 6 (opposite and 1 block south of the Cafe Amazon in Khao Takiap)https://goo.gl/maps/q1XD4zV9ajd8a2x58 Phone: +66 (0) 81-173-4469 (Chris - English language only)Phone: +66 (0) 89-815-3169 (Gae - English & Thai language)Email: info@adventurecyclingthailand.com

Additionally\, various DJs will spin energetic tunes\, creating an electrifying atmosphere that will make it impossible not to dance on the sandy shores of Hua Don Beach. To complement the beach lifestyle\, a dedicated food zone will serve a tantalizing array of dishes from renowned local restaurants. Festival-goers can savor delectable Thai cuisine\, seafood delicacies\, and other beach-inspired delights.

event_name: Khao to Khao 99 Zone 2 (Songkran Beach Soaking Adventure)
event_description: Khao Takieb to Khao Tao Songkran Saturday Morning Beach Run/Walk/Hike + All Friendly Dogs. Park at the ferry terminal and meet directly on the beach in front of Anantasila at 6:45am. Meet here: https://goo.gl/maps/H7SnhZM51NxKNdDY6 The goal is to keep the entire run/walk/hike at 99 minutes\, with your heart rate staying in the easy Zone 2 range. Start out heading south along the beach towards Khao Tao for exactly 50 minutes\, and then turn around and head directly back to the starting point and try to make it back in 49 minutes. Just keep it at 99 minutes total. We should all be starting and finishing at the exact same time (8:39am) Please let us know if you want to eat breakfast at Anantasila resort after the event. If we have enough people joining for breakfast\, we may be able to get a group discount. Please let us know in the comments if you want to eat at Anantasila. Thank you!

event_description: L'Occitan is thrilled to have two of Thailand's brilliant chefs prepare a four-course dinner that will take place at L'Occitan on Sunday\, October 30. Chef Christian Martena Christian Martena is the owner and chef of Clara's\, one of the most sought-after fine-dining experiences in Bangkok. He also developed the restaurants\, the Six Senses on Koh Samui and opened Sensi in Bangkok. Hervé Frerard Hervé Frerard is one of the most experienced chefs in Bangkok\, has served as an advisor to the Royal Project Foundation\, is the honorary president of Escoffier Disciples in the Asia Pacific area\, and has opened a number of well-known restaurants such as Le Beaulieu\, Aldo's in Bangkok\, and was the chef at Ginette in Singapore. Together\, they will produce a symphony of French and Italian dishes for your enjoyment. We will begin taking reservations immediately.
